2026-06-02IRCCImmigration and Refugee Protection ActReappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)Reappointment of Nadra Shamas Qadeer of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective August 14, 2026.N/A
subject: Reappointment of a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office)
precis: Reappointment of Nadra Shamas Qadeer of Toronto, Ontario, as a full-time member of the Immigration and Refugee Board (Toronto Regional Office), to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years, effective August 14, 2026.
